overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long NU Daily ETF (NUG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide daily 2x leveraged exposure to the price performance of Nu Holdings Limited (NYSE: NU) stock, less fees, and expenses. The fund uses derivatives to pursue its objective NUG was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
